_comment: ADG loop governor policy. The governor is a Stop/SubagentStop hook that (a) holds a turn ceiling as a runaway failsafe (P3 hard stop) and (b) refuses turn-end while a release-class item is signed off without 'live' evidence (P12 verifier-as-authority). It is a QUALITY gate, not a security floor: it fails OPEN (allows stop) on any error, missing DB, or missing config. The deny-by-default PreToolUse hook remains the security floor. It yields on stop_hook_active so it nudges at most once per genuine stop and can never trap the agent.

releaseGate._modes: block = refuse turn-end on a release-gate violation; warn = allow but print advisory; off = disabled

subagents._comment: P9 subagent budget gate. A PreToolUse/Task hook bounds the COST/blast-radius of multi-agent fan-out (it does not decide WHETHER a task should be a subagent). maxConcurrent caps simultaneously-active subagents; maxTotal caps spawns per session. QUALITY gate: fails OPEN on any error. Default mode is warn (advise before blocking) because a fan-out cap has cross-adapter blast radius. Set a single cap to 0 to disable that specific limit; set mode to off to disable the whole gate.
subagents._modes: block = deny a spawn that breaches a cap; warn = allow but print advisory; off = disabled
